title: Senior Hardware Design Engineer
description:
Do you have a passion for invention and self-challenge? Do you grow by pushing the limits of what’s considered feasible? At Hewlett Packard Enterprise, you will have the power to make the most out of your career. Hewlett Packard Enterprise is one of the world’s largest and most successful IT Companies. We are successful not just because of the technological solutions that we deliver, but also because of our core values and the amazing people that we have. We invest in our employees’ personal growth & development in an environment that will challenge and reward them. Hewlett Packard Enterprise is filled with energetic people, sparking technological revolutions and creating the future to help improve the lives of every customer.

Networking is one of the fastest growing businesses within Hewlett Packard Enterprise and offers opportunities to gain experience with leading edge technologies. HPE Aruba Networking offers a comprehensive open and standards-based portfolio designed to address a broad range of customer segments, from small & medium businesses to the largest enterprises with advanced requirements for leading branch, campus LAN and data center solutions. Our innovative technology and open, standards-based approach to networking is resonating with customers around the world, and HPE Aruba Networking’s revenue exceeds the sum of its next five competitors. Here, employees leverage new technologies and innovate to solve real world customer challenges.

We are currently looking for a dynamic, talented and innovative technical leader to be part of our high-speed digital circuit design team developing state-of-the art networking products. Explore your career options with HPE, together we will do something amazing!

Sounds like you? Then we have the right opportunity for you!


How You Will Make Your Mark:

As a Senior Hardware Design Engineer, you will be part of a dynamic and highly skilled R&D team that creates high quality products.

Responsibilities include providing technical leadership and direction to the hardware design team and translating design requirement documents to design architecture. You will collaborate with a multi-sited product development team to integrate your deliverables toward the release of new products into production. You will innovatively solve issues, drive completion of the project to schedule, and collaboratively network with other technical contributors. You will be owning all aspects of assigned areas, including feasibility study, design, verification and debug.


About You:

· Must have a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Electronic Engineering or related fields.

· Minimum 12 years of experience in systems design (integrated electrical circuits, designing complex circuit like servers, cellphone etc.)

· Excellent knowledge and deep technical understanding of both digital and analog circuit design.

· Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

· Proven technical leadership skills and experience in mentoring and guiding teams.

· Good knowledge and keen interest in high-speed design, signal integrity issues and power distribution techniques.

· Hands-on experience in measuring and characterizing high-speed digital signals.

· Board design experience with Cadence CAD design tools like Orcad, Allegro.


Additional preferred abilities:

· Outstanding interpersonal skills, with ability to work in teams or work independently.

· Capable of making autonomous decisions.

· Capable of building relationships with other teams, a self-motivator and possess good listening skills.

· Excellent written and verbal communication skills; mastery in English and local language. Ability to effectively communicate product architectures, design proposals and negotiate options at management levels.
